aligned_lyrics.text: Plastic chair digging into my bones
I hum your name under buzzing drones
Like the drum full of T-shirts and old
Like these warm clothes pressed to my
I pretend that I’m not alone
I trace your text in the soap on the
“Call me later” from a year in the past
I press my cheek to the gentle heat
If I stay here till the morning comes
Like the drum full of T-shirts and old
Like these warm clothes pressed to my
I pretend that I’m not alone
Like the drum full of T-shirts and old
Like these warm clothes pressed to my
I pretend that I’m not alone
